name: glu
description: A modular utility library for Mudlet that just works. No fuss, no muss.

scripts.build:
(
set -e pipefail
npx @gesslar/muddy
npm run build:single
npm run build:min
npm run build:docs
npm run build:lib
)
scripts.build:min: python unify.py src/scripts build/tmp/Glu-unified.lua && python mini.py build/tmp/Glu-unified.lua build/Glu-min.lua
scripts.build:lib: npx bedoc --config bedoc/bedoc.yaml --sub library && python gen-library-instance.py src/scripts build/library
